title: Resolution Declaring a State of Mourning in the Municipality of Los Baños for the Untimely Demise of Honorable Mayor Caesar Pabalate Perez From December 4,2020 to the Date of His Interment. (AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) Josephine S. Evangelista, Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, 12/04/2020)
